A '''cyber reaction system''' was a high-powered [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic implant]] used around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Jedi Civil War]]. It was employed to supplement the [[nervous system]] of an [[Species/Legends|organic being]] by causing the [[Cyborg/Legends|individual's]] neural impulses to travel greater distances at higher speeds.

==Description==
A cyber reaction system was a powerful [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic implant]] used to enhance the [[nervous system]] of an [[Species/Legends|organic being]]. The implant increased the speed of the [[Cyborg/Legends|user's]] neural impulses and the distance that the impulses traveled, which in turn improved the user's reaction [[Time/Legends|time]] and aided [[Gender/Legends|his]] or her fine motor control. The user of a cyber reaction system required extensive training with implants before being able to handle the implant's effects. The implant was [[Color/Legends|blue]] over most of its surface, with touches of white around the edges.<ref name="kotor" />

==History==
Cyber reaction systems were in use during the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] surrounding the [[Jedi Civil War]].<ref name="kotor" /> In the year [[3956 BBY]],<ref name="KotORDate" /> the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] [[Eli Gand]] had one of these implants for sale for 7500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] at his shop in the [[Czerka Landing Port]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].<ref name="kotor" />

==Behind the scenes==
The cyber reaction system first appeared in ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', a [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] produced by [[BioWare]]. In the game, its only appearance was as a purchasable item at the shop of the merchant Eli Gand at the Czerka Landing Port on Kashyyyk. It was a level-three implant in the game and gave a large bonus to the user's dexterity attribute.<ref name="kotor" />
